name_en: M24675 Black. The Noé BB bag belongs to the Nautical Capsule series, crafted from soft and durable Epi leather. The refined design combines iconic materials with a embossed wave pattern, featuring smooth calfskin for the base and strap. A practical removable clutch is included inside with accessories. Dimensions: 20×20×15cm
